title: FOTW Session — discovery_call — FOTW-3ba99698
body:
[prospect] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): The problem is we're losing leads because we can't keep up with follow-ups

[prospect] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): How much does this cost? What would the investment look like?

[prospect] (2026-03-29T20:12:02): That makes sense. How do we get started?
